title: Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple
tagline: Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

heroImage.alt: Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple, Telangana

overview.short: Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Devasthanam is a Hindu temple in the village of Pembatla, Sarangapur mandal, Karimnagar District, Telangana, India.
overview.description: Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Devasthanam is a Hindu temple in the village of Pembatla, Sarangapur mandal, Karimnagar District, Telangana, India. It is one of the oldest and most famous temples in Karimnagar District, primarily worshipping Shiva in the form of Dubba Rajeswara Swamy. Maha Shivaratri is the biggest festival celebrated at the temple. Other festivals celebrated include Sri Krishna Janmastami, Dasara, Vinakaya chaturthi, Sri Rama Navami, Deepavali, and many more.

topPlaces.name: Polasa
topPlaces.description: Polasa is a village located in the marikindha Jagtial district of Telangana State, India. Polasa is a village which is roughly 10 km from Jagtial town.

topPlaces.name: Jagtial
topPlaces.description: Jagtial, natively spelt as Jagityala, is a city and the district headquarters of Jagtial district of Telangana state, India. Located about 190 kilometres (118 mi) north of the state capital Hyderabad, it has an average elevation of 293 metres (961 ft).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (174 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (166 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Dubba Rajeshwara Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Polasa, Jagtial.
